spec.description: 4xx and 5xx error responses by route and status
spec.title: Errors by Route (4xx + 5xx)

spec.description: Average HTTP response time across all endpoints
spec.title: Avg Response Time

spec.description: Percentage of responses returning 5xx server errors
spec.title: Server Error Rate

spec.expr: sum by (method, path) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_sum{service_name="droneedge"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (method, path) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name="droneedge"}[5m])), 1)

spec.description: Average response latency per route (ms)
spec.title: Avg Latency by Route

spec.description: HTTP response latency at p50, p95, and p99 percentiles
spec.title: Response Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)

spec.description: Request rate broken down by HTTP method and route
spec.title: Request Rate by Route

spec.description: HTTP response rate broken down by status code
spec.title: Responses by Status Code

spec.description: Total HTTP requests per second across all routes
spec.title: Request Rate

spec.description: Average response payload size by route
spec.title: Avg Response Size by Route

spec.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, method, path) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name="droneedge"}[5m]))))

spec.description: Top 10 slowest routes by p95 latency
spec.title: Slowest Routes (p95)

spec.description: Successful responses (2xx + 3xx) per second
spec.title: Success Rate

spec.description: Network throughput: total bytes in and out per second
spec.title: Network Throughput

spec.description: Total page views per hour
spec.title: Page Views / hr

spec.description: Successful logins in the last hour
spec.title: Logins / hr

spec.description: New user registrations in the last 24 hours
spec.title: Registrations (24h)

spec.description: Failed login attempts in the last hour
spec.title: Failed Logins / hr

spec.description: Page views per minute: all pages, articles, and courses
spec.title: Page Views Over Time

spec.description: Authentication events per minute: logins, failed logins, token refreshes, registrations
spec.title: Auth Activity Over Time

spec.description: Top 10 most viewed articles in the selected time range
spec.title: Top Articles by Views

spec.description: Top 10 most viewed courses in the selected time range
spec.title: Top Courses by Views

spec.description: Top 15 most visited pages by total views in the selected time range
spec.title: Top Pages by Views
